triggers.value: (^You (?:killed|defeated) the (?:.*))|^(You find (?:.*)[!])|(?:You (?:get|take) (.*) (copper|silver|gold|platinum) (?:coin|coins) from (?:.*) corpse)|(?:Total value: (?:(.*) platinum))|(?:You (?:take|get|pick) (?:.*) (unusual|peculiar|exotic) (?:.*) from (?:.*) corpse)|(?:^You are (just beginning on the path to|very far from|a long distance from|a fair distance from|just under halfway to|just over halfway to|getting closer to|fairly close to|very close to|on the verge of) (?:.*) (novice|greenhorne|beginner|apprentice|wanderer|adventurer|adept|great adventurer|veteran|expert|rising hero|hero|titan|champion|legend|myth)[.])|(^You finally recover)
triggers.name: Trax1
